sglang.title: Optimize the update flashinfer indices
sglang.author: xiaobochen123
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
When running a large batch, sglang also have the CPU bottleneck. One of the bottleneck occurs when updating the flashinfer kv indices. The naive pytorch implement slow when batch is very large.

Hardware: 1xH800
Model: Llama-3-8B

// launch server
python3 -m sglang.launch_server    \
    --trust-rem

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix ModelScope models in v0.5.5
vllm.author: NickLucche
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #7986
This recent PR #7710 introduced support for some huggingface-specific code which needs to be handled differently when the model come from ModelScope, where as far I know, there is no preprocessor_config.json standard for image models (please correct me if I am wrong).

vllm.title: [BugFix][Core] Multistep Fix Crash on Request Cancellation
vllm.author: robertgshaw2-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
SUMMARY:

assertion in multi-step scheduler that request is in RUNNING state
if a client disconnects, it triggers an engine.abort(request_id) call, which moves the sequence_group into FINISHED_ABORTED state, which crashes the server since the assertion is no longer true

vllm.title: [Frontend][VLM] Add support for multiple multi-modal items in the OpenAI frontend
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR is an iteration of #7923 and in particular simplifies the multimodal placeholder padding logic.
Note that now we use a dictionary to keep track of unique placeholders and their counts, and the order of insertion is still preserved when we add them to the input prompt if they're missing. This
